meta.title: Maya Rodriguez - Photography
meta.description: Portrait and lifestyle photography portfolio with modern responsive layouts

sections.headline: Capturing authentic moments
sections.subheadline: Portrait and lifestyle photographer based in New York. Specializing in natural light and genuine connections. Every session tells a story—your story.

sections.heading: About
sections.body:
I believe the best photographs come from real moments, not posed perfection. With 10 years of experience, I've photographed everything from intimate weddings to major advertising campaigns. My approach is simple: make people feel comfortable, and the rest follows naturally.

Natural light is my medium. Authenticity is my style. Every session is a collaboration—we work together to create images that feel like you, only more beautiful. No stiff poses, no forced smiles, just genuine moments captured forever.

items.title: Elena & James Wedding
items.description: Intimate Brooklyn wedding with 150 guests. Captured candid moments throughout the day—from getting ready to the last dance. 800+ photos delivered.

items.title: Nike Campaign
items.description: Lifestyle photography for Nike's new running collection. Shot in Los Angeles with professional athletes. Featured in global campaign across 30+ markets.

items.title: Family Portraits
items.description: Ongoing family portrait series documenting growth over 5 years for multiple families. Annual sessions capturing authentic family dynamics.

items.title: Editorial Shoot
items.description: Fashion editorial for Vogue featuring sustainable clothing brands. 12-page spread highlighting ethical fashion movement.

items.title: Corporate Headshots
items.description: Executive headshot series for Fortune 500 tech company leadership team. 20 executives photographed in 2 days. Refreshed entire brand image.

items.title: Newborn Session
items.description: Lifestyle newborn photography in-home sessions for new parents. Documenting the first weeks of life with warmth and intimacy.

items.title: Product Photography
items.description: E-commerce product photography for luxury jewelry brand. 200+ SKUs shot with consistent lighting and brand aesthetic.

items.title: Destination Wedding
items.description: Tuscany destination wedding for international couple. Week-long coverage capturing celebration across multiple venues.

items.quote: Maya has an incredible ability to make everyone feel comfortable. Our wedding photos are exactly what we wanted—genuine, beautiful, and full of emotion. We still look at them weekly.
items.name: Elena Martinez

items.quote: The corporate headshots Maya took for our executive team elevated our entire brand presence. Professional yet approachable—exactly what we needed. Our LinkedIn engagement increased 40%.
items.name: Robert Chen

items.quote: Working with Maya on our Nike campaign was seamless. She understood the brand vision and delivered images that exceeded expectations. The campaign was our best-performing of the year.
items.name: Sarah Johnson

sections.heading: Let's create something beautiful
sections.subheading: Available for weddings, portraits, commercial work, and editorial projects. Booking 3-6 months in advance recommended.
